name: contentforge
description: v3.12.3 fixes two production bugs: (1) dual-copy save — finished .docx now also written to user-visible ~/Documents/ContentForge/<brand>/<type>/<YYYY-MM>/ alongside the internal tracking copy, fixing the 'file isn't saving on local drive' report; (2) per-phase checkpointing via scripts/checkpoint-manager.py + new /contentforge:resume command — interrupted pipeline runs resume from the last completed phase instead of restarting from Phase 1. Also new: /contentforge:output-folder command to reveal the visible output folder in the OS file manager. Enterprise content production pipeline — 10-phase workflow, 19 skills, 13 agents, fact-checker, 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, C2PA provenance for the .docx output (EU AI Act Article 50 compliance), May 2026 AEO/GEO reality (AI Overviews, LLMs.txt, Profound/Otterly measurement). Multi-plugin coexistence: zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): aliases like latest-balanced-anthropic / latest-vision-google resolve to concrete ids at call time; deprecated ids auto-fall-forward. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.

interface.shortDescription: Enterprise content production pipeline with humanizer, fact-checker, C2PA provenance, and 10-phase brand-voice workflow.
interface.longDescription: ContentForge brings a canonical 10-phase content production pipeline to OpenAI Codex via 19 portable Agent Skills. Run the full pipeline (title curation -> research -> brief -> draft -> humanizer 29-pattern AI-detection sweep -> fact-checker -> SEO/AEO/GEO optimizer -> reviewer scorecard -> .docx export with C2PA provenance -> social adaptation) or pick individual phases. Skills are platform-portable (same SKILL.md frontmatter open standard used by Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot CLI). 16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors (Slack, Notion, Canva, Webflow, Gmail, Google Calendar, Figma, etc.) connect only when env vars are configured — zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs for clean multi-plugin coexistence. Optional Python scripts (humanizer, fact-checker, generate-docx with --c2pa-sign for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance) run when Python 3.8+ is available.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start a new ContentForge content production pipeline.
